prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 28th Edition of Star Awards 2023 (Chinese: 2023) is a television award ceremony that acknowledges the finest Singaporean television performers between January and December 2022. The Star Awards 2023 is set to be the biggest celebration of Chinese entertainment industry talent and content in Singapore, with the theme "Beyond | Celebrations" being redefined as a star-studded concert that brings together the best performers from Singapore and the region for an unforgettable night of glitz, excitement, and celebrations.
B. The 28th Edition of Star Awards 2023 (Chinese: 红星大奖2023) is a television award ceremony that honoured the best in Singaporean television released between January and December 2022. Star Awards 2023 prepares for the largest celebration of local Chinese entertainment industry talent and content in Singapore! The Star Awards 2023, with the theme "Beyond | Celebrations," have been redefined as a star-studded concert, bringing together the best performers from Singapore and the region for an exhilarating night of glitz, excitement, and celebrations unlike any other. The Ceremony was once again held at Marina Bay Sands, Singapore on 9 April 2023.The current All-Time Favorite Artiste Felicia Chin and Rebecca Lim earned their tenth Top 10 Most Favorite Artiste awards, in last years' ceremony, making Rebecca Lim the ninth celebrity to
C. The 28th annual Star Awards 2023 (Chinese: 红星大奖2023) represented a television awards ceremony designed to commend the top achievements in Singaporean television programming broadcast during the period spanning January through December of 2022. Star Awards 2023 is gearing up to host the grandest festivity recognizing the talent and productions within Singapore's local Chinese entertainment sector! This year's Star Awards 2023, conceptualized under the theme "Beyond | Celebrations," has been reimagined as a prestigious, celebrity-filled musical event. It will gather exceptional entertainers from both Singapore and the broader region to deliver a thrilling evening brimming with spectacle, enthusiasm, and festivities that stand unparalleled. The formal ceremony took place once more at Marina Bay Sands in Singapore on the 9th of April, 2023. Felicia Chin, who currently holds the title of All-Time Favorite Artiste, alongside Rebecca Lim, each achieved their tenth Top 10 Most Favorite Artiste awards at the previous year's ceremony, which positioned Rebecca Lim as the ninth public figure to accomplish this feat.

Answer:
